nasb.text: Having said this, he took bread and gave thanks to God in the presence of all, and he broke it and began to eat.

esv.text: And when he had said these things, he took bread, and giving thanks to God in the presence of all he broke it and began to eat.

cnv.text: 保羅說了這話，就拿起餅來，在眾人面前感謝　神，然後擘開來吃。

ccb.text: 保罗说完后拿起饼，当众感谢上帝，然后掰开吃。

csbs.text: 说完这些话，保罗就拿起饼，在大家面前感谢神，然后掰开来，开始吃。
